### 🏢 Get a Complete AI Agency Team — No Hiring Needed

Stop paying $50K+/year for developers, designers, and DevOps. Get **24 AI agent specialists** that work 24/7 for a fraction of the cost.

### What You Get:

**🔴 Engineering Division (8 agents)**
✅ Frontend Developer — React, Vue, shadcn/ui, pixel-perfect
✅ Backend Architect — API design, databases, scalability
✅ Mobile App Builder — React Native, Flutter, iOS/Android
✅ AI Engineer — ML models, deployment, LLM integration
✅ DevOps Automator — CI/CD, Docker, Cloudflare, monitoring
✅ Rapid Prototyper — MVPs in hours, not weeks
✅ Senior Developer — Laravel, architecture, refactoring
✅ Security Engineer — Pentesting, hardening, OWASP

✅ UI Designer — Design systems, components, Figma→Code

✅ Agent Architect — Multi-agent orchestration

✅ Research & Watch — Tech monitoring, trends

### ✅ Works With:
Claude Code · Cursor · ChatGPT · Copilot · Hermes Agent · Any AI tool

### Why Choose Me:
- ✅ 24 specialized agents, not one generic AI
- ✅ Works on any VPS ($5/month Hetzner)

**Message me before ordering to discuss your needs!**

## FAQ (à ajouter dans le gig)

**Q: Do I need a specific AI tool?**
A: No! The agents work with ANY AI: Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, Copilot, Hermes, or any other.

**Q: Can I customize the agents?**
A: Yes! Each agent is a markdown file you can edit to match your brand, tech stack, and preferences.

**Q: Is there a monthly subscription?**
A: No. One-time purchase. The agents are yours forever.

**Q: Do I need a VPS?**
A: Not necessarily. The agents are just text files. A VPS is only needed if you want to run Hermes Agent 24/7.
